docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $30.00 SERVED JAN-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARBAJAL, FROYLAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF JEREMY CHEW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FROYLAN CARBAJAL IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEW, JEREMY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARBAJAL, FROYLAN DEFENDANT SHALL PAY NOTHING. DEFENDANT SHOWED THAT HE PAID RENT FOR SEPTEMBER AND OCTOBER 2024. DEFENDANT DID NOT PAY RENT FOR NOVEMBER AND DECEMBER BECAUSE PLAINTIFF TOOK HIS PROPERTY THAT HE INTENDED TO SELL TO PAY RENT. THE COURT FOUND THE DEFENDANT TO BE MORE CREDIBLE THAN THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,456.36 FILED BY CHEW, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT CARBAJAL, FROYLAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
